title: User avatar shows '?' fallback instead of actual initial or avatar
description: The bottom-left of the sidebar shows a '?' icon with the label 'User' instead of the user's actual initial or avatar. Since the auth API confirms the user is authenticated with a 'pro' plan, the app should display meaningful user identity info (e.g., first initial, email, or plan badge).
expected: User avatar showing initial letter or profile image, with name or email

title: No plan/subscription info visible in the UI
description: The auth API returns plan='pro' but there is no visual indicator of the user's subscription plan anywhere in the UI. Adding a plan badge near the user info would help users confirm their subscription status.

title: Auth API correctly returns authenticated status with plan info
All major navigation sections load successfully
description: New Chat, Search, Documents, Projects, Agent Profiles, and Teams all load without errors. Each view renders its expected content.

title: No console errors related to auth
description: Browser console shows no errors. No auth timeout or error indicators observed.

title: App shows main interface, not onboarding
description: The authenticated user sees the full app with sidebar, chat area, and all navigation options. No onboarding or login gate is shown.
actual: Full app displayed with sidebar and content area
